race_meta.race_name: Read Meg Nicholls' Blog At betmgm.co.uk Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner crimon rambler was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Crimson Rambler with 45.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Crimson Rambler > Time To Sparkle, but actual result was Crimson Rambler > Pangbourne. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
